---
title: "The Rev. Charles Hudson"
---

## The Rev. Charles Hudson

**Dates:** (1828-1865)

### Description

Vicar of Skillington, Lincolnshire

### Biography

He was a well-known mountaineer who had died in July 1865 while climbing the Matterhorn. His wife was Emily Antoinette Mylne.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
